sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39212" key="e)pidialei/pw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιδια-λείπω</orth>, <sense id="n39212.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">allow to elapse</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὀλίγας ἡμέρας</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:1:17" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.17</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
